text: Submitted a paper on moisture-induced stress in encapsulated IGBT modules to IEEE Transactions on Materials and Device Reliability, currently under review.
Published a first-author review on black phosphorus-based nanocomposite anode materials for lithium-ion batteries in Battery Energy.
Presented research on acidic steel slag as an anode material for lithium-ion batteries at ICMERE2025, CUET.
Graduated with a BSc in Mechanical Engineering (First Class Honours, CGPA 3.57/4.00) from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology.
Joined the Nanomaterials and Energy Storage System (NESS) Lab at CUET as a Research Intern under Dr. Md. Arafat Rahman.
